# Bayesian meta-analysis workflow

### Data preparation

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/workflow-guide.html#stage-1-data-preparation)
Stage 1

Import data

[`tibble::tibble()`](https://tibble.tidyverse.org/reference/tibble.html)  
One row per study  
Binary / continuous / count

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Trustworthiness assessment (INSPECT-SR)

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/inspect_sr.html) Stage
2

[`inspect_sr()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/inspect_sr.md)
[`inspect_sr_table()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/inspect_sr_table.md)
`inspect_sr_plot()`
[`filter_trustworthy()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/filter_trustworthy.md)

Trustworthiness across 4 domains

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

**Plots:**
[`inspect_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/inspect_plot.md)
[`inspect_summary_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/inspect_summary_plot.md)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Preliminary exploration (PRIMED)

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/primed.html) Stage 3

[`primed()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/primed.md)

Dependence structure, moderators, ES distribution

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Risk of bias assessment

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/risk-of-bias.html)
Stage 4

[`rob_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/rob_plot.md)

Traffic light plot, domain-level judgements

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Model specification & fitting

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/workflow-guide.html#stage-5-model-specification)
Stage 5

`bayesma(sample_prior = TRUE)`
[`pp_check()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/pp_check.md)

Priors (μ, τ), RE distribution, likelihood, stage, bias correction

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Model fitting

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/convergence-diagnostics.html)
Stage 6

`bayesma(stage = "one_stage")` `bayesma(model_type = " ")`

Stan MCMC, 4 chains, convergence diagnostics

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Model comparison

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/model-comparison-diagnostics.html)
Stage 7

[`compare_models()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/compare_models.md)
[`compare_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/compare_plot.md)
[`compare_table()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/compare_table.md)

LOSO-CV / LOO-IC, calibration, CRPS / ELPD

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Model diagnostics

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/convergence-diagnostics.html)
Stage 8

[`diagnostics()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/diagnostics.md)
[`pp_check()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/pp_check.md)

Trace plots, Rhat, ESS, posterior predictive check

![](reference/figures/trace_plot.png)

![](reference/figures/pp_check.png)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Bias assessment

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/funnel-plots.html)
Stage 9

[`egger()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/egger.md)
[`egger_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/egger_plot.md)
[`funnel_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/funnel_plot.md)
[`robma()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/robma.md)

Selection models, PET-PEESE, bias-corrected, RoBMA

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Heterogeneity assessment

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/workflow-guide.html#stage-8-heterogeneity-assessment)
Stage 10

[`forest()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/forest.md)
`bayesma(re_dist = "mixture")` `bayesma(model = "robust_outlier")`

τ² posterior, predictive distribution

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Subgroup and moderation analysis

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/meta-regression.html)
Stage 11

[`meta_reg()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/meta_reg.md)
[`metareg_mod_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/metareg_mod_plot.md)
`forest(subgroup = TRUE)`

Categorical / continuous moderators, regression coefficients

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Sensitivity analysis

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/sensitivity-analysis.html)
Stage 12

[`sensitivity_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/sensitivity_plot.md)

Prior, studies-excluded, RE dist., one/two-stage, RoBMA

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjgiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyMCAyOCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTEwIDAgVjIyIE00IDE3IEwxMCAyNCBMMTYgMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzlDQUFCOCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxLjgiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIgLz48L3N2Zz4=)

### Interpretation and reporting

[Link](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/articles/reporting-checklist.html)
Stage 13

[`bayesma()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/bayesma.md)
[`forest()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/forest.md)
[`overall_plot()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/overall_plot.md)
`sensitivty_plot()`
[`interpret()`](https://blmoran.github.io/bayesma/reference/interpret.md)

Pooled effect + 95% CrI, P(direction), Bayes factor, forest plot, MCMC
diagnostics

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

**Left boxes:** bayesma functions connects to **Right boxes:** outputs /
configuration
